subject: Move persistent reference docs from plan folder to docs/analysis/
description:
Move the following docs from plans/P0022_2026-05-07_10-00_preprocessing-pipeline-modularization/ to docs/analysis/nielsen-preprocessing/ (create subdirectory):
- 2026-05-14_DOC-monolithic-to-modularized-insights.md → MOVE to docs/analysis/nielsen-preprocessing/ (architectural reference, useful beyond P0022)
- 2026-05-15_DOC-eda-design-rationale.md → MOVE to docs/analysis/nielsen-preprocessing/ (CSD EDA parameter justification, thesis-citable reference)
The following STAY in plan folder (plan artifacts only):
- STEP_SCRIPT_TEMPLATE.md (template, plan-scoped)
- 2026-05-14_DOC-consolidation-and-cleanup-plan.md (plan artifact)
- 2026-05-07_DOC-* series (phase completion notes, plan-scoped)
- archive/ subfolder (already correctly placed)
Create docs/analysis/nielsen-preprocessing/ directory. Move 2 files. Update any cross-references in P0022 plan doc that point to the moved files.
